north_star: Hive Mind production v0 is a local, auditable provider-CLI runtime harness. MemoryOS and CapabilityOS are optional substrates, not blockers.

task.title: Module extraction plan
task.description: Make harness.py production-testable by extracting or preparing extraction for memory bridge, provider passthrough, flow runtime, and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: Focused tests pass before full gate

task_queue.title: Stabilize current green runtime tree
task_queue.description: Run the full Hive test gate, inspect current uncommitted scope, and prepare a commit boundary without reverting other agents' edits.
acceptance_criteria: Next turn owner and task are explicit

task_queue.title: Production runtime boundary review
task_queue.description: Review H-P0 claim and decide which docs/release gates must stop blocking on MemoryOS/CapabilityOS substrate features.
acceptance_criteria: No overclaim beyond runtime harness v0
Post-v0 substrate items are separated from H-P0 blockers
Provider passthrough policy risks are named
task_queue.notes: Claude boundary position and PUBLISHING_GATE update already recorded in shared comms.

task_queue.title: Module extraction plan
task_queue.description: Make harness.py production-testable by extracting or preparing extraction for memory bridge, provider passthrough, flow runtime, and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: Focused tests pass before full gate

task_queue.title: Hive inspect and receipt surface
task_queue.description: Add or harden a path-hidden operator summary over run state, provider results, ledger/proof, receipts, policy decisions, and next action.
acceptance_criteria: hive inspect <run> works without reading run folders
MemoryOS absence is shown as degraded, not failed

task_queue.title: Hive-only production smoke gate
task_queue.description: Add a release smoke script that verifies Hive runtime without requiring MemoryOS.
acceptance_criteria: Smoke covers init, run, local step, provider dry-run, ledger replay, inspect, stop, and validation
MemoryOS is optional in the smoke

history.summary: Initialized Hive H-P0 pingpong sprint using MemoryOS HANDOFF.json method.
Completed H-P0.0 control-plane setup and advanced to H-P0.1 stabilization.
H-P0.1 full gate passed: npm test ran 252 tests OK. H-P0.2 accepted from existing Claude/PUBLISHING_GATE record. Advanced to H-P0.3 module extraction.

handoff_protocol.rule: Only the current turn owner edits files_to_touch for the active task. Other agents observe or review.
